g.text: Admission open for 2026-2027 batch! Apply online.
Dr. P.K. Abdul Ghafoor Memorial M.E.S. ITI offers high-demand NCVT courses with cutting-edge workshops.
"Our mission is to empower youth with advanced technical skills, building a foundation of practical knowledge..."
Excellent wiring workshops, winding machines, test panels, and safety apparatus modules.
Civil surveying labs, blueprints, estimation, materials, and comprehensive AutoCAD designing.
Covers digital circuits, microcontrollers, troubleshooting, smart setups, and solar systems.
Submit your entry. Fields marked with * are required.
Accredited training and strong industry linkages.
"Panel connections training prepared me for sub-station needs."
"Mastering AutoCAD and drawings at the campus gave me a huge edge."
"The placement cell is exceptional. The mock interviews helped immensely."
Placement Support Officer: Prof. K. A. Latheef
Have enquiries? Connect with our administration desk.
Dr. P.K. Abdul Ghafoor Memorial M.E.S Pvt ITI
Office Secretary: Prof. K. A. Latheef
Building skill foundations under the MES heritage.
To be a premier institution in vocational training, delivering skilled human resource assets to meet global industrial standards.
Provide excellent infrastructure, state-of-the-art tools, and skilled instruction to foster technical expertise and entrepreneurship.

Established in 1964, the Muslim Educational Society (MES) has been a pioneer in high-quality educational infrastructure in Kerala. The Dr. P.K. Abdul Ghafoor Memorial ITI continues this legacy by molding skilled technicians.
Dr. P.K. Abdul Ghafoor Memorial M.E.S ITI
